_description: Measured /api/* apibench workload set. Contract: benchmarks/shared/API-SPEC.md §4 (measured endpoints) and §7 (canonical requests). Bodies are committed literals — deterministic by construction, no runtime randomness. api-transform's body is transform_inputs[0] from the frozen shared dataset (the §7 transform_input0 canonical request); the api-compress body was generated once with a fixed seed (42) in the shared-corpus word style. nginx never implements /api/* (§9) — runners must skip it for apibench.

workloads.name: api-users
workloads.description: Dataset window + stable sort + top-20 serialization (§5.4; §7 users_page1 request).

workloads.name: api-transform
workloads.description: JSON parse + SHA-256 per field + value reversal (§5.5; §7 transform_input0 request).

workloads.name: api-aggregate
workloads.description: 10k-point sort + percentiles + quintile stats (§5.6; §7 aggregate_default request).

workloads.name: api-search
workloads.description: Regex scan over the 1000-item corpus + rank sort (§5.7; §7 search_network_top10 request).

workloads.name: api-compress
